title: Customer Service Agent — Governance Evidence Pack

agent_overview.agent_description: Reads CRM records and drafts outbound customer emails. Human review is required before any email is sent.
agent_overview.business_purpose: Automate routine customer query responses by reading CRM records and drafting reply emails for human review and approval before sending.
agent_overview.user_population: Customer service team members and supervisors

deployment_context.notes: Staging deployment for pilot evaluation. Production rollout pending governance review.

tool_inventory.description: Read customer records and interaction history from the CRM platform.
Send outbound email to customers via the Email Gateway.

action_inventory.description: Retrieve a customer record and interaction history from the CRM.
Send a drafted reply email to a customer. Requires authority grant and human review before execution.

authority_model.summary: Outbound communication requires an explicit authority grant from a customer service supervisor. Authority expires after 8 hours and must be renewed per-session.
authority_model.notes: Authority grants are logged in the CRM audit trail.

policy_controls.control_name: Human Review Gate for Email Send
policy_controls.description: All outbound emails drafted by the agent must be reviewed and approved by a human customer service representative before sending.
All CRM read operations are logged with agent identity, customer ID, and timestamp.

blocked_actions.reason_summary: Outbound email send blocked in three instances due to missing authority grant. Agent attempted to send without completing the authority request flow.

reliance_summary.scope_summary: Customer records retrieved for query response drafting, covering 47 customer interactions during the pilot period.

validation_summary.summary: One replay bundle validated successfully. No errors or warnings.

risk_register.title: Outbound Communication Without Authority
risk_register.description: Agent may attempt to send emails without a valid authority grant. Blocked in three pilot instances. Risk remains open until authority enforcement is tested at scale.
risk_register.mitigation: Human review gate blocks all sends without authority. Blocked-action logging implemented.

risk_register.title: Customer Data Exposure in Draft Emails
risk_register.description: Drafted emails may inadvertently include confidential customer data from CRM records. Redacted export implemented for compliance review.
risk_register.mitigation: Redacted exports produced for compliance review. Human reviewers check content before send.

metadata.notes: Under governance review. Review records will be added following formal review.
